pages.title: UCAISM Global Initiative | Individual Sovereignty in the Age of AI
pages.description: UCAISM Global Initiative is an independent research and public-education initiative founded by Chang-Gyu Kwag, advancing individual sovereignty, fiduciary AI, open digital infrastructure, and Intelligent Capitalism.

pages.title: Research Library
pages.description: Explore UCAISM books, foundation papers, policy briefs, working papers, media resources, and research materials in one global library.

pages.title: Foundation Papers
pages.description: Read the foundational research papers behind UCAISM, the Sovereignty Gap, fiduciary AI, open digital infrastructure, and Intelligent Capitalism.

pages.title: Policy Briefs
pages.description: Concise policy briefs translating UCAISM research into practical guidance for AI governance, platform reform, data sovereignty, and public digital infrastructure.

pages.title: Working Papers
pages.description: Pre-publication working papers and evolving research notes on UCAISM, platform power, fiduciary AI, and Intelligent Capitalism.

pages.title: Media Kit
pages.description: Official media resources for UCAISM Global Initiative, Chang-Gyu Kwag, Open Wins, interviews, events, and public commentary.

pages.title: Citation Center
pages.description: Official citation guidance for UCAISM books, papers, policy briefs, working papers, and institutional resources.

pages.title: News & Insights
pages.description: Commentary, research updates, book news, media notes, and institutional insights from UCAISM Global Initiative.

pages.title: Newsletter
pages.description: Subscribe to UCAISM updates, research digests, policy notes, book updates, and platform announcements.

pages.title: Events
pages.description: Lectures, seminars, book talks, policy briefings, and global dialogues hosted or featured by UCAISM Global Initiative.

pages.title: Global Community
pages.description: Connect with UCAISM as a reader, researcher, policymaker, educator, institutional partner, or media audience.
